metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4630
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1B. western blot shows KIF5A,B,C were present in synaptic membrane fractions from mouse hippocampus.

Figure S2. Confocal imaging of dissociated hippocampal neurons transfected with tdTomato and equal amounts of either KIF5A-GFP or KIF5B-GFP show puncta present in the heads of dendritic spines. Similar results were obtained from labeling with GFP and immunostaining with specific antibodies against either KIF5A or KIF5B.

Further assays show that disruptions of KIF5A and KIF5B distinctly affects spine morphogenesis, plasticity and dendritic transport.. Experimental description: both mice and rats were used throughout the extensive set of experiments. We here annotate against mouse proteome, used for the initial detected (WB) and ephys

Antibodies;
KIF5B was previously described (PMID: 20870970)
KIF5A from Abcam, RRID:AB_2132218
KIF5C from Abcam, RRID:AB_304999

shRNA constructs;
KIF5A, Transfected construct (R. norvegicus), 5'-TGGAAACGCCACAGATATC-3'
KIF5B, Transfected construct (M. musculus), 5'-GGACAGATGAAGTATAAAT-3'
KIF5C, Transfected construct (R. norvegicus), 5'-GACCCTGGCAGATGTGAAT-3'
